_comment: KoiSlabs Discord notification messages by shift group and day of week. Edit any message here to update what posts to Discord — no code changes needed.

day_shift._streamers: Mon: Presley & Adonis | Tue-Fri: Kozy & Matthew | Sat-Sun: Presley & Adonis
day_shift.monday:
✨ Presley & Adonis are LIVE on KoiSlabs and the auctions are STARTING! 🔥
⚡ Kick off your week right — From 10:00AM to 7:00PM PST, KoiSlabs is auctioning slabs and you don't want to miss a bid!
👀 Watch LIVE: https://www.tiktok.com/@koislabs/live
day_shift.tuesday:
🌟 Kozy & Matthew are back and LIVE on KoiSlabs! 💥
🎯 Tuesday's looking good — From 10:00AM to 7:00PM PST, the auctions are LIVE and KoiSlabs is not slowing down!
🚀 Watch LIVE: https://www.tiktok.com/@koislabs/live

overnight_shift._streamers: Mon: Orion | Tue-Fri: Scooby & Martin | Sat-Sun: Orion
overnight_shift.monday:

💫 From 7:00PM to 5:00AM PST, KoiSlabs keeps the auctions going all night long — get in here before you miss a bid!
